title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Research Associate Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences, Bangalore (NIMHANS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Research Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering can use this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more,...
